transcription.text: Things you need to know before traveling to China Get up-to-date information on the latest visa requirements, pre-travel checklist, recommendations on attractions, and the most delicious food all from the Hello China Travel Guide on Trip.com app. I traveled to Shanghai, China and visited attractions they recommended. Following the directions and the transportation guide on the Trip.com app, we headed to the beautiful ancient town of Zhouzhuang and experienced Chinese culture and trying the delicious local food. Another spot that the China Guide recommended is Tianzifang with plenty of shopping, artsy cafes, restaurants, bars, and food you wouldn't want to miss. Finally, spending a night at the Yu Garden to enjoy the beautiful architectural marvel is a must. Click the link in my bio for more information. Happy travels!
